user.title: Configure Chameleon
user.description: Set up Chameleon to apply image colors to your lights. Select multiple lights to distribute colors from the image palette across them.

data_description.light_entities: The RGB lights to control with scene colors. Each light will receive a unique color from the image palette.
data_description.media_player_entity: Optional media player to use as a color source. When selected, a 'Media Player' scene option becomes available that extracts colors from the currently playing album art.
data_description.animation_enabled: Continuously cycle through colors from the image

abort.already_configured: These lights are already configured with Chameleon
